tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: 获取指定城市的当前天气。参数：city(城市名)，country(国家代码可选，如CN)

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: 获取多日天气预报。参数：city(城市名)，days(天数1-16)

tools.name: search_repos
tools.description: 搜索GitHub仓库。参数：query(搜索关键词)

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: 获取仓库文件内容。参数：owner(仓库所有者)，repo(仓库名)，path(文件路径)

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: 创建或更新文件。参数：owner, repo, path, content, message

tools.name: push_files
tools.description: 推送多个文件。参数：owner, repo, branch, files(数组)

tools.name: create_repo
tools.description: 创建新仓库。参数：name, description, private

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: 列出仓库Issue。参数：owner, repo, state(open/closed)

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: 创建Issue。参数：owner, repo, title, body

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: 搜索代码。参数：q(搜索语句)，repo(可选限制仓库)
